bird.name: 美洲白鹮
bird.summary: 美洲白鹮（學名：Eudocimus albus）为鹮科美洲鹮属的鸟类。其种加词“albus”意为“白色的”。分布于美洲热带与亚热带。 參考資料 外部連結 维基共享资源上的相關多媒體資源：美洲白鹮 維基物種上的相關信息：美洲白鹮

relations.subject: 美洲白鹮
relations.evidence: |year=1991 |title=The Impact of Hurricane Hugo on the Breeding Ecology of Wading Birds at Pumpkinseed Island, Hobcaw Barony, South Carolina |journal=Colonial Waterbirds |volume=14 |issue=2 |pages=151–57 |jstor=1521504 |doi=10.2307/1521504}} The American white ibis is found in a variety of habitats, although shallow coastal marshes, wetlands and mangrove swamps are preferred.{{Cite journal | last1 = Kushlan | first1 = J
relations.object_summary: 浅水、沼泽与植被斑块组成的高生产力生态系统。

relations.object_summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。
